name: forecast_aware_storage_dispatch
title: Forecast-Aware Battery Dispatch for Renewable Smoothing

raw.Name: forecast_aware_storage_dispatch
raw.Title: Forecast-Aware Battery Dispatch for Renewable Smoothing
raw.Experiment: Build a simplified battery dispatch simulation with renewable generation and load uncertainty. Compare a myopic rule-based dispatch policy against a forecast-aware optimization policy using metrics such as renewable curtailment, peak load reduction, battery cycling, and unmet demand.

name: nonwires_demand_response_storage
title: Coordinated Deferrable Demand and Battery Dispatch for Non-Wires Peak Relief Under Import Constraints

raw.Name: nonwires_demand_response_storage
raw.Title: Coordinated Deferrable Demand and Battery Dispatch for Non-Wires Peak Relief Under Import Constraints
raw.Experiment: Extend the scaffold by decomposing demand into inflexible load and a deferrable energy component that must be served within a fixed deadline window. Add a dispatch simulator with an explicit grid-import cap representing feeder thermal limits or local resource-adequacy constraints, while enforcing energy conservation for deferred demand. Compare (1) battery-only dispatch, (2) deferrable-demand-only shifting, and (3) coordinated battery plus deferrable-demand control. Use simple rule-based or short-horizon look-ahead policies to decide when to defer demand, recover deferred demand, charge, and discharge. Evaluate across random seeds and parameter sweeps for deferrable-load fraction, deadline window, battery size, and import-cap tightness. Report peak grid import, number of cap-violation hours avoided, renewable curtailment, battery cycling, fraction of deferrable load served within deadline, and unmet energy when flexibility is insufficient.
